mapper.select: SELECT TRIM(CONCAT(r.sido, ' ', r.sigungu, ' ', COALESCE(r.dong, ''))) AS name, r.sido AS sido, r.sigungu AS sigungu, r.dong AS dong, COUNT(*) AS count FROM meetings m JOIN regions r ON m.regionId = r.regionId WHERE m.deletedAt IS NULL GROUP BY r.sido, r.sigungu, r.dong ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, MAX(m.createdAt) DESC, r.sido ASC, r.sigungu ASC, r.dong ASC LIMIT 4

SELECT m.meetingId as meetingId, m.hostUserId as hostUserId, u.nickname AS hostNickname, u.nickname AS meetingHostName, u.profileImage AS hostProfileImage, u.createdAt AS hostCreatedAt, SUBSTRING_INDEX( ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(s.name ORDER BY s.sportId ASC SEPARATOR ' · ') FROM userSports us JOIN sports s ON us.sportId = s.sportId WHERE us.userId = m.hostUserId ), ' · ', 2 ) AS hostSports, m.title, m.content, m.supplies as supplies, m.guideText as guideText, m.meetingType as meetingType, m.repeatType as repeatType, m.thumbnailImage, m.placeName as placeName, m.address, m.meetingDate as meetingDate, m.startTime as startTime, m.maxMembers as maxMembers, m.status, s.name AS sportName, CONCAT(r.sido, " ", r.sigungu, " ", COALESCE(r.dong, "")) AS regionName, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetingParticipants mp WHERE mp.meetingId = m.meetingId AND mp.status = "APPROVED" ) + CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM meetingParticipants hostMp WHERE hostMp.meetingId = m.meetingId AND hostMp.userId = m.hostUserId AND hostMp.status = "APPROVED" ) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS approvedCount FROM meetings m JOIN users u ON m.hostUserId = u.userId JOIN sports s ON m.sportId = s.sportId JOIN regions r ON m.regionId = r.regionId WHERE m.meetingId = #{meetingId} AND m.deletedAt IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO meetings(hostUserId, sportId, regionId, title, content, thumbnailImage, placeName, address, meetingDate, startTime, maxMembers, meetingType, repeatType, supplies, guideText, status) VALUES (#{hostUserId}, #{sportId}, #{regionId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{thumbnailImage}, #{placeName}, #{address}, #{meetingDate}, #{startTime}, #{maxMembers}, #{meetingType}, #{repeatType}, #{supplies}, #{guideText}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE meetings SET sportId = #{sportId}, regionId = #{regionId}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, placeName = #{placeName}, address = #{address}, meetingDate = #{meetingDate}, startTime = #{startTime}, maxMembers = #{maxMembers}, status = #{status}, supplies = #{supplies}, guideText = #{guideText}, thumbnailImage = #{thumbnailImage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updatedAt = NOW() WHERE meetingId = #{meetingId}
UPDATE meetings SET status = 'CANCELLED', deletedAt = NOW() WHERE meetingId = #{meetingId}
UPDATE meetings SET status = 'ONGOING', updatedAt = NOW() WHERE deletedAt IS NULL AND status NOT IN ('ONGOING', 'COMPLETED', 'CANCELLED') AND TIMESTAMP(meetingDate, startTime) <= NOW()
